title: Uptime
description: Snapshot of an uptime-monitored site's configuration. Emitted when a site is created or its config changes — these events are NOT per-probe results. Per-probe uptime check results use event_type "uptime_check" and carry duration (round-trip ms), location (probe region), site.id, site.name, and response.status_code.

id.description: Site DB id (matches the site.id nested key on probe events).

name.description: Display name of the site (matches site.name::str on probe events).

state.description: Last observed reachability state of the site.
